role_summary: Canonical engineering playbook and project governance document that standardizes software development lifecycles, quality gates, and development workflows for both human and AI contributors.
finding: The system enforces a deterministic, convention-driven development framework that prioritizes explicit architectural boundaries, automated quality assurance, and parallelizable workflows. It explicitly bridges traditional engineering practices with AI-assisted development by establishing strict operational guardrails, standardized project structures, and enforced testing protocols to ensure consistency, maintainability, and reproducible outcomes without manual oversight.
